languages.text: "Вам бы лучше порадоваться, что хоть кто-то смог явиться на помощь".

traits.locale_text: "Вам бы лучше порадоваться, что хоть кто-то смог явиться на помощь".

languages.text: "You ought to be celebrating the fact that one person has actually managed to come to your aid."

languages.text: “你该庆幸才对，好歹真有人来帮你了。”
languages.original_text: "You ought to be celebrating the fact that one person has actually managed to come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: “你该庆幸才对，好歹真有人来帮你了。”

languages.text: « Vous devriez plutôt vous réjouir que quelqu'un se soit débrouillé pour vous venir en aide. »
languages.original_text: "You ought to be celebrating the fact that one person has actually managed to come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: « Vous devriez plutôt vous réjouir que quelqu'un se soit débrouillé pour vous venir en aide. »

languages.text: "Bir kişinin ne yapıp edip gerçekten yardımına koştuğunu gördüğün için neşelenmen gerekir."
languages.original_text: "You ought to be celebrating the fact that one person has actually managed to come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: "Bir kişinin ne yapıp edip gerçekten yardımına koştuğunu gördüğün için neşelenmen gerekir."

languages.text: «Debería celebrar que al menos una persona haya conseguido acudir en su ayuda».
languages.original_text: "You ought to be celebrating the fact that one person has actually managed to come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: «Debería celebrar que al menos una persona haya conseguido acudir en su ayuda».

languages.text: "Ihr solltet den Umstand feiern, dass eine Person es tatsächlich geschafft hat, Euch zu Hilfe zu kommen."
languages.original_text: "You ought to be celebrating the fact that one person has actually managed to come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr solltet den Umstand feiern, dass eine Person es tatsächlich geschafft hat, Euch zu Hilfe zu kommen."

languages.text: 「1人でもあなたの助けに駆けつけたという事実を祝うべきですよ」
